item.title: ‘Operation Pawpulation’ Founder Urges Public To Spay And Neuter Pets
item.description: Spay and Neuter Awareness Month highlights the benefits of spaying and neutering cats and dogs, from reducing overpopulation to providing health and b...

item.title: LEGO Drops New McLaren To Celebrate 2025 F1 Champ, And It Looks Great
item.description: LEGO has really gone all-in with its F1 range, but its latest release, the Technic McLaren MCL39, shows how far its designers have come.

item.title: Top 5 Renewable Energy Sources Reshaping The Global Economy In 2026
item.description: Solar, wind, hydro, geothermal and bioenergy are reshaping global power systems. Here’s how they work and what 2025 data reveals.

item.title: Legal AI Startup Legora Eyes $400 Million Raise At $5 Billion-Plus Valuation
item.description: As investors double down on the promise of automating legal work, the company is in talks to raise $400 million following two rounds in late 2025.

item.title: CFO Inertia To Cost Brands 34% Of Profits By 2030, Says Climate Report
item.description: The report projects a 3% climate-cost shock that could erase a third of profits, and high-risk scenarios could push losses to 67%, urging fashion bran...
